summary: Comprehensive testing of Plan4Growth Academy completed successfully. All backend APIs (16/16) working perfectly. Frontend UI fully functional with gradient-shaded hero, complete admissions flow, navigation, contact forms, and authenticated dashboard access. All required features from testing list verified and working.

design_issues.issue: 404 error handling may not have a custom error page

passed_tests: Backend API Health Check - All 16 endpoints passing (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with gradient-shaded hero image and background
Apply Now button navigates correctly to /admissions page
Admissions page shows Entry Requirements with checkmarks (4 requirements)
Admissions page shows Required Documents (5 documents listed)
Admissions page shows 7-step Application Process
Admissions page shows Programme Fee £7,999 clearly displayed
Admissions page shows Intake Dates (3 intake options)
Navigation menu working - Home, Diploma Programme, Faculty, Admissions, Contact
/api/ health endpoint returns healthy status
/api/courses returns course data (1 course available)
/api/contact accepts form submissions with success message
/api/auth/register creates new user successfully
/api/auth/login returns JWT token correctly
Dashboard loads for authenticated users with stats and navigation
Contact form submission working with toast notifications
Authentication flow working - login/register pages load correctly
Session-based authentication working for dashboard access
All mocked APIs working (Stripe payments, S3 uploads, notifications)
Responsive design working across different screen sizes
